mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, email, bio, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, email, bio, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) AND deleted = 0
